text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And with that, let the Umadol Concert
Meeting begin!☆

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Now requesting
meeting agenda data.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wait, what… How did I get caught up in this?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
On today's agenda is… discussing interactive
performances for the fans!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
After all, the best part of concerts is
when you feel a strong connection
with everyone there☆

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Searching memory for activities involving
strong connections… Match found.
How about forming a human pyramid?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't think that's what we're talking about…
It's a little too acrobatic.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we're Umadols, not the circus.
Maybe we could have the audience clap
along or have them sing the chorus!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Then why don't we have the
audience clap, and we could perform
backflips and somersaults in time with
their claps?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, why don't we move away
from acrobatics…
